title: TOPS
description: TOPS (Tools of Power and Survival) is a Minecraft modpack that combines building, tech, and exploration, featuring popular mods like Create, AE2, Macaws, Mekanism, Mystical Agriculture, and more, while also providing performance optimizations.
body:
Key Features:

    -Building Excellence: T.O.P.S emphasizes creativity and building. The Create mod allows you to construct intricate contraptions and intricate machines. Design elaborate structures and automation systems to bring your Minecraft world to life.

    -Tech Advancements: Dive into the realm of advanced technology with mods like Mekanism. Harness the power of machinery and automation to streamline resource gathering, processing, and crafting.

    -Agricultural Mastery: Mystical Agriculture opens up a world of farming possibilities, allowing you to grow resources such as ores and materials. Boost your resource production and crafting capabilities.

    -Exploration: With a variety of exploration-focused mods, T.O.P.S encourages you to venture into the unknown. Discover new biomes, dungeons, and dimensions to keep your Minecraft experience exciting.

    -Performance Optimization: T.O.P.S is designed with all players in mind, including those with lower-end systems. It incorporates performance mods to ensure a smooth gameplay experience without sacrificing quality.

    -Community-Tested: This modpack has been carefully curated and tested by the Minecraft community to ensure a balanced and enjoyable experience.

Whether you're a master builder, a tech wizard, or an intrepid explorer, T.O.P.S has something for everyone. Unleash your creativity, automate your world, and embark on epic adventures with this modpack. It's time to discover the Tools of Power and Survival in the Minecraft universe.

You will also need twilightforest-1.20.1-4.3.2508-universal.jar from Curseforge
